GET /model/status.description: Return loaded model metadata and available horizons.

GET /traffic/predict/{segment_id}?horizo.description: Predict future speed for one segment using latest feature vector.

POST /traffic/predict/batch.description: Batch prediction for multiple segment feature rows.
POST /traffic/predict/batch.input: List of JSON rows containing expected_input_features.

GET /predictions/{prediction_id}/explain.description: Return top factors based on SHAP or feature importance.
